debug_info.goal:
x y : BitVec (4 + 4)
⊢ x ^^^ y = y ^^^ x

failed_attempts:
simp_all [BitVec.xor, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_two, Fin.val_succ]
    <;> rfl)

apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    ext i
    simp [bitwise_op_comm]
    <;>
    simp_all [BitVec.xor]
    <;>
    cases (x[i]) <;> cases (y[i]) <;>
    simp [Bool.xor_comm]
  exact h_main

intro i
  have h₁ : (x ^^^ y).get i = (x.get i) ^ (y.get i) := by
    simp [BitVec.xor, BitVec.get_bitwise_op]
  have h₂ : (y ^^^ x).get i = (y.get i) ^ (x.get i) := by
    simp [BitVec.xor, BitVec.get_bitwise_op]
  have h₃ : (x.get i) ^ (y.get i) = (y.get i) ^ (x.get i) := by
    rw [Nat.xor_comm]
  simp_all

intro x y
    ext i
    simp [BitVec.xor_def, Fin.val_zero]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try
      {
        fin_cases i <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  exact h x y

cases x <;> cases y <;>
    simp [BitVec.xor, List.xor, List.zipWith]
    <;>
    rfl
  exact h_main
